title: Level 224
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Level 224: New Year's Eve}} {{Background|file=FIREWORK.gif}}
{{Underline|FFFFFF}} {{Underline|FFFFFF}}
Level 2025:
'''New Year's Eve'''
{{Underline|FFFFFF}} {{Underline|FFFFFF}}
{{Audio|file=Fireworks.mp3|volume=0.35|align=center}} {{Audio|file=Tower of unsettling height.mp3|align=center|secrettext=Two Steps From Hell (APM Music)|volume=0.5}} {{Audio|file=Old Doll.mp3|align=center|secrettext=Old Doll (NOT APM Music)|volume=0.5|=no}} {{Underline|FFFFFF}} {{Underline|FFFFFF}} [[File:Huh lantern????.png|500px|link=|center]][[File:So lantern!!!!.png|500px|link=|center]]
'''December 31st, 2025.'''

That's the date you promised your family and friends to go home and celebrate New Year's Eve. You planned to do many things with them: bring them gifts and presents, take them to the fireworks show, host parties, count down, you name it. Excited, you get in your vehicle and drive to your house. But while driving, you got caught in a traffic jam for 2 hours straight, now you can't think of what you were supposed to do when you get home, because you're about to be late. You looked at your phone while still keeping an eye on the road.
'''5:47 PM'''

You panicked, sped up, and ignored everything else while your family and friends kept waiting—waiting... But you know they're there, waiting; if you miss this day, they'll be disappointed. You took shortcuts, doing whatever it took to get home. You crossed a rusty bridge; it's not the safest choice, but it's one of the fastest routes you could take, because if you don't get there quickly, they'll think you didn't keep your promise.

[[File:Late night drive.png|400px|center|link=]]


After a few hours, you've finally arrived. You walked through the pathway, wanting to surprise your friends and family, but on your way to your house, you tripped on a pebble. Getting up, you continued on your way, but your house seemed to have disappeared, replaced by a river with a city on the other side.
'''Welcome home, my dear.'''

[[File:New Years Eve.png|400px|center|link=|We can watch the firework show together.]]
{{Underline|FFFFFF}} {{Underline|FFFFFF}}
{{Class 0|entity=˙uɹoqqnʇs os ƃuᴉǝq doʇS|hexagon=[[File:Class0Lv224.png|121px|link=]]|color-h=350}} ==[[File:nocinretnaL.png|20px|link=]][[File:Lanternicon.png|20px|link=]] Description==
Themed after New Year's Day, '''Level 224''' appears as a nighttime metropolis adorned with lanterns and fairy lights, alongside occasional silver/gold colored balloons spelling out "Happy New Year!" and presumably faraway Times Square Balls being dropped from the sky; in other words, it is an amalgam of western and Asian theming. Parks, houses, apartments, and skyscrapers appear to be in pristine condition, with most adorned with the same decorations as the exterior, along with added garlands and stockings. The lighting in the city is bright, mostly from the lanterns that hang from the houses. When entering the level, the time starts at 11:55 PM, and as the clock approaches 12:00 PM, the Times Square Balls descend, all the lights dim, and the entire level goes silent.
[[File:Welcome to home..png|400px|center|link=|Is it too lonely, my dear?]]

When it strikes midnight, all lanterns and other light sources diminish, plunging the entire level into complete darkness. After 5 seconds, fireworks shoot into the sky, exploding into colorful sparkling "stars" arranged in different formations. The firework show lasts 45 minutes, and every 5 minutes, a chain of firecrackers on one of the large Christmas trees explodes, which can be hazardous if one is not paying attention. Those inside '''Level 224''' during this felt nostalgic, feeling bad for what they did and wanting to go back to the past. Certain photographs have a kine-like effect, causing them to look old and familiar, usually when one wants to take a picture for remembrance.
[[File:Lunar New Year.png|400px|center|link=|Time flies fast, I know.]]

Numerous documents from wanderers indicate that fireworks do not exist; rather, the explosions that are observed do. Due to this, it might look like fireworks randomly appeared without a source, though the launch sound can be heard. The reason for this phenomenon remains unknown. The surface of the water in '''Level 224''' is coated in a decently strong layer of ice, allowing a wanderer to traverse it. This layer seems to have friction, unlike actual ice, letting one walk on it without slipping like a comedian. Wanderers should avoid jumping on the ice, as the force can shatter it into pieces, descending one into the sorrowful water below.
[[File:Im so festive.png|400px|center|link=|What? Am I too unfamiliar to you?]]

'''Level 224''' is almost devoid of entities; even if one attempts to enter, they vanish instantly and without a trace. There have been numerous claims that [[Entity 9|Facelings]] and [[Glowfolk|Glowfolks]] exist, but these are simply hallucinations caused by staring at fireworks for an extended period of time. There is one exception, that being [[Entity 224]].

These entities are predatory and aggressive toward everything. When they appear, they will leave a distinct trail unlike the other fireworks. They will aim at a random wanderer and move at 75 km/h towards the victim, locking in until they either hit the target or run out of time. To survive, always use [[Entity 224]]'s weak torque to dodge and evade them as they approach. However, because of its rarity, one should not be concerned about being struck by one.
[[File:... Giggly?.png|400px|center|link=|Huh?]]

'''Level 224''' is intricately connected to [[Level 909]], with both levels embodying festive and New Year themes, while also facilitating a transition between one another. Furthermore, '''Level 224''' comprises a substantial, distinct portion of [[Level 909]], alongside segments of [[Level 11]] and [[Level 9.01]]. This unique composition leads to the current characteristics of '''Level 224''', which are influenced by the elements of the levels it encompasses.

One can enter '''Level 224''' in two ways. Walking towards any of the left or right lantern walls in '''The Gateway (牌坊)''' and forcing themselves through can lead to '''Level 224'''. The second way only happens when [[The Frontrooms]] experiences New Year's Eve. During this, any wanderer going back home to celebrate has a slim 1/1200 chance to have the level replaced by what it used to be previously. Those who have entered through the latter will be sent to a random [[Special:RandomInCategory/Levels|level]]. Otherwise, one can exit '''Level 224''' through elevators that lead to [[Level 11]], or, if one is lucky enough, can encounter '''The Lantern Walk (灯笼步道)''', which leads to Level 909.









'''"I have a question for you."'''

'''"Tell me, darling... Am I beautiful?"''' she asked.

I couldn't help but admire her. Her voice, her appearance, all that—it felt like my wife; her voice, her dress, her hair—it reminded me of her. For the first time in my life, it was oddly comforting, even when I thought something catastrophic would happen. It's so peaceful and stress-relieving, but the loneliness of the entire city made me anxious. She looked at me, trying to comfort me.

'''"Aw... Why are you so scared? Don't worry, my dear, nothing will hurt us. It's just you and me."'''

My mind drifted back to my wife. She had her moments, sure—getting angry when I came home too late or when I asked her to do something she didn’t want to. She had a knack for being kindhearted, even when she was frustrated. I still missed her, even years after she passed. Meeting this woman, even if she wasn’t my wife, felt like a second chance, like I was reconnecting with her spirit.

Even if she's not my wife, it felt like her. Maybe now I can rest.

We held our hands, looked at the firework show, jumped up, and yelled

'''''"Happy New Year!!"'''''

Then we went silent. It was joy, an emotion blinded by sorrow and paranoia, something I've never felt before. After a moment, she leaned in close, holding my hands tightly, and whispered sweetly in my ear.

'''"I..."'''
[[File:There's a reason for that previous file to be named "... Giggly?".png|400px|center|link=|˙ɹɐǝp ʎɯ 'noʎ ǝʌol sʎɐʍlɐ llᴉʍ I pu∀]]

'''"I love you-"'''
